and that he who have promise a free pardon and remission unto all penitent sinner through faith in Jesus Christ , will purge and cleanse my soul from all uncleanness , and deliver i from all bloodguiltiness by the blood of his son our saviour . the true sorrow that i find in my soul for my former sin , and that godly resolution and steadfast purpose i have to lead a new life if it please God to continue it , together with the joy , the patience , and the courage i have to suffer , give i some assurance of this bless hope , that through faith in Christ Jesus my saviour , my penitent soul though sinful shall be save . and as for my religion , i die , as i live , a true protestant ; and though natural i incline to evil , and wicked company draw i to most heinous and filthy sin ; yet i thank God i hate that religion that teach impiety and wickedness , rebellion , murder and injustice , or that approve the kill of king and their loyal subject for their loyalty , as have its original rather from the devil , who be a murderer from the beginning , than from God ; Cowper in Rom. 8.1 . there be three most notable help of a godly life , deliver to we by David , in three verse of the 119 psalm , 57 o lord , i have determine to keep thy word . 58. i have make my supplication in thy presence with my whole heart . 59 i have consider my way , and turn my foot unto thy testimony . determination be the first : it be a good thing by settle resolution to conclude with thy self that thou will live godly . supplication be the second : except by continual prayer thy determination be confirm , and strengthen by grace from God , thy conclusion which thou take to day , shall vanish to morrow . consideration be the three , and it be profitable to reduce thou again into the way of God , so often as of weakness thou lie wander from it , contrary to thy first determination . these be three help to keep thy heart in the way of God : so necessary , that if without they thou do any work , it be not possible but thou shall be snare . First therefore determine to forsake thy usury , and to make restitution . second , strengthen this determination by prayer , say with David , create in i a clean heart , oh God : Psal. 51.10 . Psal. 119.36 and renew a right spirit within i . incline my heart unto thy testimony : and not to covetousness . third , consider thy former course when thou be a thievish usurer , and say with our bless saviour : what be a man profit , if he shall gain the whole world , Math. 16.26 and lose his own soul ? or what shall a man give in exchange for his soul ? say with the holy apostle S. Paul , they that will be rich , fall into temptation and a snare , and into many foolish and hurtful lust , 1 Tim. 6.9 . which drown man in perdition and destruction . final , do good , v. 18 , 19 be rich in good work , ready to distribute , will to communicate , lay up in store for thy self a good foundation against the time to come , that thou may lay hold on eternal life . consider what i say , 2 Tim. 2.7 . and the lord give thou understand in all thing , farewell .
